subcodes.first_line: The veiling of women preventeth learning and instruction. The divines have, in this matter, gone to such extremes that even the voice of women [is forbidden] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حجاب نسوان مانع از تعلیم و تعلم است فقهاء درینخصوص مبالغه نمودند که حتی صوت نساء
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Eastern values; culture, @veiling [hijab], @role and station of women, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
